name: CME GROUP INC.
summary: CME Group operates derivatives exchanges (CME, CBOT, NYMEX, COMEX) offering futures, options, cash and OTC products across interest rates, equity indexes, foreign exchange, agricultural commodities, energy, metals, and cryptocurrencies. It provides central counterparty clearing, cash and repo fixed income trading via BrokerTec, spot and OTC FX trading via EBS, market data services, and research and analytics tools to clients worldwide.

products.name: CME Globex
products.description: Electronic trading platform operating central limit order book markets for futures and options across all asset classes.

products.name: CME Direct
products.description: Platform for arranging, executing, recording and risk-managing trades across all six major asset classes, including mobile access.

products.name: BrokerTec
products.description: Cash and repo fixed income trading platform.

products.name: EBS
products.description: Spot and OTC foreign exchange trading platform.

products.name: E-mini S&P 500
products.description: Equity index futures contract, a key benchmark product.

products.name: E-mini Nasdaq 100
products.description: Equity index futures contract for Nasdaq 100 benchmark.

products.name: E-mini Russell 2000
products.description: Equity index futures contract for Russell 2000 benchmark.

products.name: SOFR Futures and Options
products.description: Interest rate derivatives based on Secured Overnight Financing Rate.

products.name: WTI Crude Oil Futures
products.description: Energy futures contract for West Texas Intermediate crude oil.

products.name: Bitcoin and Ether Futures
products.description: Cryptocurrency futures contracts including Bitcoin, Ether, Solana and XRP.

products.name: Market Data Services
products.description: Real-time, historical and derived data for listed and cash products in various formats.

products.name: OSTTRA
products.description: Post-trade services platform, trademark held by MarkitSERV Limited.

partnerships.description: CME Group is transitioning its infrastructure to Google Cloud.
CME licenses Dow Jones and S&P trademarks including Dow Jones Industrial Average and S&P 500 for its products.
CME licenses S&P trademarks for use in its equity index products.
CME licenses S&P Dow Jones Indices trademarks for its benchmark products.
